ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mutants" (
  "mutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutant */,
  "mutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mutant */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of mutant (e.g., point mutation, deletion) */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Genetic sequence of the mutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein */,
  "mutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mutant associated with the protein */,
  "structure" TEXT /* 3D structure of the protein */,
  "function" TEXT /* Biological function of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein interaction */,
  "protein_a_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first protein in the interaction */,
  "protein_b_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second protein in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., binding, inhibition) */,
  "interaction_strength" REAL /* Strength of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_protein_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_b_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_protein_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_a_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., protein structure, interaction strength) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation run */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_value" TEXT /* Value of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of mutant (e.g., point mutation, deletion)
Reference to the mutant associated with the protein
Unique identifier for each protein interaction
Reference to the first protein in the interaction
Reference to the second protein in the interaction
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the simulation being accessed
ID of the user accessing the simulation
Date when the simulation was accessed
IP address of the user accessing the simulation
Type of result (e.g., protein structure, interaction strength)
Role of the user in the group
